zh.lifeSummary: 當John FitzAlan I於大約1200年出生在英國英格蘭素可阿盧德爾時，他的父親William FitzAlan II 1st Lord of Owestry44歲，母親de Lacy35歲。他於大約1220年與Isabel d'Aubigny在英國英格蘭素可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1240年3月12日在英國史洛普爾奧斯維斯崔享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John FitzAlan I于大约1200年出生在英国英格兰素可阿盧德爾时，他的父亲William FitzAlan II 1st Lord of Owestry44岁，母亲de Lacy35岁。他于大约1220年与Isabel d'Aubigny在英国英格兰素可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1240年3月12日在英国史洛普爾奧斯維斯崔享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: FitzAlan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ ( see Fitz ) + the personal name Alan ( see Allen ), ‘son of Alan’.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

variants.name: Allen
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Alain, Alein (Old Breton Alan), from a Celtic personal name of great antiquity and obscurity. In England the personal name is now usually spelled Alan, the surname Allen; in Scotland the surname is more often Allan. From 1139 it was common in Scotland, where the surname also derives from Gaelic Ailéne, Ailín, from ail ‘rock’. The present-day frequency of the surname Allen in England and Ireland is partly accounted for by the popularity of the personal name among Breton followers of William the Conqueror, by whom it was imported first to Britain and then to Ireland. Saint Alan(us) was a 5th-century bishop of Quimper, who was a cult figure in medieval Brittany. Another Saint Al(l)an was a Cornish or Breton saint of the 6th century, to whom a church in Cornwall is dedicated.
English: occasionally perhaps from the rare Middle English femaje personal name Aline (Old French Adaline, Aaline), a pet form of ancient Germanic names in Adal-, especially Adalheidis (see Allis ).
French: variant of   Allain  , a cognate of 1 above, and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When John FitzAlan I was born about 1200, in Arundel, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, his father, William FitzAlan II 1st Lord of Owestry, was 44 and his mother, de Lacy, was 35. He married Isabel d'Aubigny about 1220, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 12 March 1240, in Oswestry, Shropshire, England, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John FitzAlan I est né environ 1200, à Arundel, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William FitzAlan II 1st Lord of Owestry, avait 44 ans et sa mère, de Lacy, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Isabel d'Aubigny environ 1220, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 12 mars 1240, à Oswestry, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: John FitzAlan Iが約1200年にイギリスイギリススセックスアルンデルで生まれた時，父William FitzAlan II 1st Lord of Owestryは44歳，母de Lacyは35歳であった。約1220年にイギリスイギリススセックスでIsabel d'Aubignyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1240年3月12日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアオスウエストリーで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John FitzAlan I(이)가 대략 1200년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 아런들에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William FitzAlan II 1st Lord of Owestry(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 de Lacy(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1220년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 Isabel d'Aubigny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1240년 3월 12일 영국 슈럽실르 오스w스트리에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John FitzAlan I родился около 1200 г. в местности арундель, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William FitzAlan II 1st Lord of Owestry было 44 года, а матери, которую звали de Lacy, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel d'Aubigny около 1220 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 12 марта 1240 г. в местности освестри, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 41 год.
